data.title: Add post-install Phase 1.7 re-detection and Phase 2 skip to onboarding SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description

Modify `plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md` to add Phase 1.7 (post-install re-detection) that bridges template installation to DSO infrastructure setup.

### Implementation
After Phase 1.6a or 1.6b successfully installs a template:
1. Re-run Phase 1 auto-detection (project-detect.sh, detect-stack.sh) against the newly installed template files
2. Verify the detected framework matches the registry framework_type for the installed template
3. If mismatch: surface warning (partial install?) but continue
4. Skip Phase 2 (Socratic dialogue) entirely — templates pre-answer most questions
5. Proceed directly to Phase 3 (DSO infrastructure: hooks, ticket system, CLAUDE.md)
6. Phase 3 configuration inferred from: registry metadata (framework_type) + detection output
7. If re-detection returns unexpected results: surface warning, do NOT crash

### File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (PROTECTED — user approved)

### TDD Exemption
test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 1 — skill file workflow guidance

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains Phase 1.7 section
  Verify: grep -q "Phase 1.7" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Re-runs auto-detection
  Verify: grep -q "re-run.*detect\|detect.*re-run\|re-detect" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Skips Phase 2
  Verify: grep -qi "skip.*phase 2\|phase 2.*skip" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] Proceeds to Phase 3
  Verify: grep -qi "proceed.*phase 3\|phase 3.*direct" plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
